title: Lolium cylindricum
taxonomy: Lolium cylindricum is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Lolium, which includes several other species of ryegrass. The genus Lolium is further grouped into the subfamily Pooideae, and the family Poaceae is classified under the order Poales. Within the order Poales, Lolium cylindricum is part of the class Liliopsida, which is a group of monocotyledonous flowering plants. At the highest taxonomic level, the class Liliopsida is grouped under the phylum Angiospermophyta.
